A-Frame Sign Hardware Features for Business Display Solutions

This durable A-frame sign hardware provides the perfect foundation for your custom business signage needs. Built from high-quality plastic construction, this portable sign frame resists rust and splintering while maintaining professional appearance for years of outdoor and indoor use.

Professional A-Frame Construction Benefits

  • Rust-Resistant Plastic: Durable construction prevents corrosion and weathering
  • Portable Design: Folds completely flat for easy transport and storage
  • Secure Sign Mounting: Built-in tabs hold signs firmly in place during display
  • Easy Mobility: Molded handle allows effortless positioning and relocation
  • Professional White Finish: Clean appearance complements any sign design

A-Frame Sign Hardware Specifications

  • Display Size: 24" W x 36.75" H x 21.5" D when assembled
  • Storage Size: 24" W x 36" H x 2.25" D when folded
  • Weight: 9 pounds for stability and portability
  • Color: Professional white finish
  • Sign Compatibility: Accommodates standard A-frame sign panels (sold separately)

A-Frame Hardware Material for Long-Term Business Use

Our A-frame sign hardware is constructed from premium-grade plastic materials specifically selected for commercial signage applications. This material choice ensures your sign frame maintains its structural integrity and professional appearance through extended outdoor exposure.

Durable Plastic Construction Benefits

  • Weather Resistance: Plastic construction withstands rain, snow, and UV exposure without deterioration
  • Rust Prevention: Unlike metal frames, plastic construction eliminates rust and corrosion concerns
  • Splinter-Free Safety: Smooth plastic surfaces prevent injuries from wooden splinters
  • Lightweight Durability: Strong enough for commercial use while remaining easy to transport
  • Low Maintenance: Simple cleaning with soap and water maintains professional appearance

Professional White Finish

The clean white finish provides a neutral backdrop that complements any sign design or branding. This professional appearance ensures your A-frame display maintains a polished look in any business environment.

A-Frame Sign Hardware Assembly & Setup Features

This A-frame hardware is designed for quick, tool-free assembly and professional presentation. The integrated features ensure your signs display securely while providing maximum convenience for setup and transport.

Professional Assembly Features

  • Snap-Together Assembly: No tools required for quick setup at any location
  • Secure Tab System: Integrated tabs hold sign panels firmly in position
  • Fold-Flat Design: Collapses to just 2.25" depth for compact storage
  • Molded Handle: Built-in handle allows easy positioning and relocation
  • Stable Base: Wide stance prevents tipping in normal wind conditions

Sign Mounting Compatibility

The frame accommodates standard A-frame sign panels and inserts. Signs are held securely by the integrated tab system, ensuring professional display without additional hardware or tools.

Note: Sign panels are sold separately and can be customized to your specifications.

This versatile A-frame hardware supports a wide range of professional signage applications. The portable design and secure mounting system make it ideal for both temporary and permanent display needs.

Business Advertising Applications

A-Frame Sign Panel Specifications & Requirements

This A-frame hardware is designed to accommodate standard sign panels that can be customized to your specific needs. Understanding the proper dimensions ensures your signs fit perfectly and display professionally.

Compatible Sign Panel Dimensions

  • Recommended Size: Panels sized for 24" wide A-frame display
  • Mounting System: Signs held securely by integrated frame tabs
  • Material Compatibility: Works with various sign materials and thicknesses
  • Double-Sided Option: Frame accommodates signs printed on both sides

Sign Design Considerations

  • Viewing Height: Design for optimal readability at pedestrian eye level
  • Text Size: Use fonts large enough to read from several feet away
  • Color Contrast: Ensure good contrast between text and background
  • Brand Consistency: Incorporate your logo and brand colors

Custom Sign Panel Options

Sign panels are available separately and can be fully customized with your graphics, text, and branding. Various materials are available depending on your specific use requirements and budget considerations.

A-Frame Sign Hardware Frequently Asked Questions

What sign panels work with this A-frame hardware?

This A-frame accommodates standard sign panels designed for 24" wide frames. Various materials and thicknesses work with the integrated tab mounting system. Sign panels are sold separately and can be fully customized.

Is the A-frame suitable for outdoor use?

Yes, the plastic construction is weather-resistant and designed for outdoor applications. It resists rust, UV damage, and normal weather conditions. However, secure the frame during high winds or severe weather.

How much does the A-frame weigh?

The hardware weighs 9 pounds, providing stability for signage display while remaining light enough for easy transport and positioning.

What are the folded dimensions for storage?

When folded flat, the A-frame measures 24" W x 36" H x 2.25" D, making it easy to store in vehicles, closets, or storage areas.

Do I need tools to assemble the A-frame?

No tools are required. The A-frame features snap-together assembly that can be completed quickly by hand. The molded handle makes positioning easy once assembled.

Can I order sign panels at the same time?

Sign panels are ordered separately, allowing you to customize them specifically for your needs. Contact our design team to coordinate hardware and sign panel orders.

What colors are available?

This A-frame hardware is available in professional white only, providing a clean appearance that complements any sign design.

How quickly can my A-frame hardware ship?

Choose from 2, 3, or 5 business day production times. Shipping time is additional and depends on your location and selected shipping method.
